description: Orion by Gravity is an AI-powered analyst that uses an organization’s connected data and knowledge base to answer questions, run analyses, and surface metrics, workflows, and reports. It is offered as a hosted product with project, conversation, and knowledge-management features.
summary: runorion.com exposes a documented remote MCP server at `https://g.runorion.com/mcp` for Claude, Cursor, and other MCP clients; no public REST, GraphQL, or service-specific CLI surface was found.
